title: BEL – Field Operation Engineer, Project Engineer-I – 56 Posts
applyMode: Online only (via Microsoft Office Form link / QR code on BEL website)
shortInfo: BEL Recruitment 2026 aims to fill 56 new vacancies for Field Operation Engineer, Project Engineer posts. Eligible candidates with B.E/B.Tech/B.Sc can apply online from 20-05-2026 to 08-06-2026 through the official BEL website, bel-india.in.

basic_details.job_title: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 56 Field Operation Engineer, Project Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: BEL Recruitment 2026 aims to fill 56 new vacancies for Field Operation Engineer, Project Engineer posts. Eligible candidates with B.E/B.Tech/B.Sc can apply online from 20-05-2026 to 08-06-2026 through the official BEL website, bel-india.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Homeland Security and Smart City Business SBU (HLS&SCB), Bharat Electronics Limited
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via Microsoft Office Form link / QR code on BEL website)

qualification.education_qualification: ME/M.Tech/BE/B.Tech/B.Sc Engineering (4-year course) or MCA from AICTE/UGC approved college/institute or recognized university. Pass class for all categories including SC/ST/PwBD.

selection_process: Pre-Registered Walk-In Selection: Written Test (85 marks) + Interview (15 marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through the Microsoft Office Form link / QR code provided on the BEL official website. Registrations received in any other format will not be considered. Candidates must first pay the application fee via SBI Collect, note the reference number, and then complete the online form. Applications that are incomplete, not legible, contain false or suppressed information, or do not meet the eligibility criteria will be summarily rejected.
